## Task Description

Describe the task clearly, including scope and constraints.

## Agent Assignment

Choose one agent label to assign:

- [ ] `agent:odoo-specialist` - Odoo setup, modules, migration
- [ ] `agent:dbt-specialist` - dbt models, tests, macros
- [ ] `agent:schema-designer` - data modeling and architecture
- [ ] `agent:python-developer` - general Python development

## Expected Deliverables

- [ ] Deliverable 1
- [ ] Deliverable 2
- [ ] Deliverable 3

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

## Additional Context

Add links, files, environment details, and edge cases.
